definition: Any activity that uses physical exertion or skills competitively under a set of rules that is not based on aesthetics.
example: We need to understand the concept of sport.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thể thao.

definition: A playful or competitive activity.
example: We need to understand the concept of game.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trò chơi.

definition: Activity for amusement only, especially among the young.
example: Children learn through play.
exampleVi: Trẻ học thông qua vui chơi.

definition: One that plays
example: We need to understand the concept of player.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm người chơi.

definition: A set of draught animals, such as two horses in front of a carriage.
example: We need to understand the concept of team.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đội.

definition: A wheeled vehicle, generally drawn by horse power.
example: We need to understand the concept of coach.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm huấn luyện viên.

definition: A person whose job is to manage something, such as a business, a restaurant, or a sports team.
example: We need to understand the concept of manager.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm người quản lý.

definition: An umpire or judge; an official who makes sure the rules are followed during a game.
example: The referee kicked Jim out of the game for fighting.
exampleVi: Trọng tài đã đuổi Jim ra khỏi trận đấu vì đánh nhau.

definition: A regulation, law, guideline.
example: All participants must adhere to the rules.
exampleVi: Tất cả những người tham gia phải tuân thủ các quy tắc.

definition: A competitive sporting event such as a boxing meet, a baseball game, or a cricket match.
example: My local team are playing in a match against their arch-rivals today.
exampleVi: Hôm nay đội bóng địa phương của tôi đang thi đấu với đối thủ truyền kiếp của họ.

definition: The total number of goals, points, runs, etc. earned by a participant in a game.
example: The player with the highest score is the winner.
exampleVi: Người chơi có số điểm cao nhất là người chiến thắng.

definition: A discrete division of something.
example: We need to understand the concept of point.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm điểm.

definition: To conquer, defeat.
example: We need to understand the concept of win.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chiến thắng.

definition: To cause (something) to cease to be in one's possession or capability due to unfortunate or unknown circumstances, events or reasons.
example: He lost his hearing in the explosion.
exampleVi: Anh ta bị mất thính giác trong vụ nổ.

definition: The result of a contest that neither side has won; a tie.
example: The game ended in a draw.
exampleVi: Trận đấu kết thúc với tỷ số hòa.

definition: An ongoing winner in a game or contest.
example: The defending champion is expected to defeat his challenger.
exampleVi: Nhà đương kim vô địch được kỳ vọng sẽ đánh bại kẻ thách đấu mình.

definition: A competition to determine a champion, especially the final of a series of competitions.
example: We need to understand the concept of championship.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm vô địch.

definition: A venue where sporting events are held.
example: We need to understand the concept of stadium.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm sân vận động.

definition: A land area free of woodland, cities, and towns; open country.
example: There are several species of wild flowers growing in this field.
exampleVi: Có một số loài hoa dại mọc trên cánh đồng này.

definition: An enclosed space; a courtyard; an uncovered area shut in by the walls of a building, or by different buildings; also, a space opening from a street and nearly surrounded by houses; a blind alley.
example: The girls were playing in the court.
exampleVi: Các cô gái đang chơi ở sân.

definition: The state of being free from physical or psychological disease, illness, or malfunction; wellness.
example: Her mental health is really affected by stressful environments.
exampleVi: Sức khỏe tinh thần của cô thực sự bị ảnh hưởng bởi môi trường căng thẳng.

definition: Freedom provided by the cessation of activities.
example: We need to understand the concept of leisure.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhàn rỗi.

definition: The result of no longer possessing an object, a function, or a characteristic due to external causes or misplacement.
example: In other areas, glacier loss creates serious risk of a dry period across the Third Pole, Wang said.
exampleVi: Wang cho biết ở các khu vực khác, việc mất sông băng tạo ra nguy cơ nghiêm trọng về thời kỳ khô hạn trên khắp Cực thứ ba.

definition: Any activity, such as play, that amuses, diverts or stimulates.
example: We need to understand the concept of recreation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giải trí.

example: This is an example sentence using the word gymnastics.

definition: A disk, usually made of a polymer, used to record sound for playback on a phonograph.
example: We need to understand the concept of record.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hồ sơ.

definition: That which is taken from another; something captured; a thing seized by force, stratagem, or superior power.
example: We need to understand the concept of prize.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về giải thưởng.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word tie.

definition: A judgment, sentence, or final decision. Specifically: The decision of arbitrators in a case submitted.
example: We need to understand the concept of award.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về giải thưởng.

definition: To overcome in battle or contest.
example: Wellington defeated Napoleon at Waterloo.
exampleVi: Wellington đánh bại Napoléon tại Waterloo.

definition: An exercise session; a period of physical exercise.
example: We need to understand the concept of workout.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tập luyện.

example: This is an example sentence using the word cup.

definition: An instance of having won a competition or battle or succeeded in an effort.
example: It was a great victory on the battlefield.
exampleVi: Đó là một chiến thắng vĩ đại trên chiến trường.

definition: (especially Britain) A group of sporting activities including track and field, road running, cross country and racewalking.
example: We need to understand the concept of athletics.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về điền kinh.

definition: Controversy; debate.
example: no contest
exampleVi: không có cuộc thi

definition: A group or association of cooperating members.
example: the League of Nations
exampleVi: Liên đoàn các quốc gia

definition: A sports competition, especially for track and field (a track meet) or swimming (a swim meet).
example: We need to understand the concept of meet.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm gặp gỡ.

definition: A period of something, usually painful or unpleasant.
example: a bout of drought.
exampleVi: một đợt hạn hán.
